source.video_title: How I run 10 deterministic verification checks before every deploy

experiment.title: Pin script outputs against golden-fixture shape checks
experiment.hypothesis: If we add a shape-check verifier for each LLM-driven script, then silent output regressions fail CI loudly because the shape diverges before the artifact is committed.
experiment.what_they_did: Speaker described golden-fixture diffing — check shape not text, count in a range, required keys present, types match.
experiment.relevance_to_yolo_loop: Directly addresses the silent-truncation incident in process_experiments.py from May 2026.

source.video_title: Five ways your agent dies in production and how to monitor each

experiment.title: Probe the five canonical agent-failure modes in tick_tock cron
experiment.hypothesis: If we instrument silent-truncation detection, drift checks, cost caps, version pins, and success-metric direct measurement, then we catch the failure mode before it produces zero-output runs.
experiment.what_they_did: Talk enumerated five production-killer failure modes with one probe each.
experiment.relevance_to_yolo_loop: Directly maps to tick_tock.yml's running cron pipeline.

source.video_title: Why I run my prompts through a stub-LLM before the real one

experiment.title: Add stub-LLM mode to process_experiments.py for CI-testable scripts
experiment.hypothesis: If process_experiments accepts --stub flag that reads a canonical response from disk, then CI can verify shape and prompt-template rendering without API spend.
experiment.what_they_did: Karpathy described saving rendered prompts plus canonical responses and running pipelines end-to-end against the stub.

source.video_title: Talk: making LLM scripts CI-testable in 30 lines

experiment.title: Wrap LLM calls in a real/stub adapter for cheap CI testing
experiment.hypothesis: If a thin adapter switches between real-API and disk-stub at call time, then full pipeline CI runs at zero cost while catching all shape regressions.
experiment.what_they_did: Talk demonstrated a 30-line adapter pattern with real and stub modes sharing the same code path.
experiment.relevance_to_yolo_loop: Maps cleanly onto our process_experiments.py and council.py LLM call sites.
